classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.ObjectDetection
documentation:
Object Detection is a computer vision technology that identifies and locates
objects within an image, typically by drawing bounding boxes around the
detected objects and classifying them into predefined categories.

    InputType: video
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.LanguageIdentification
documentation:
Language Identification is the process of automatically determining the
language in which a given piece of text is written.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Ocr
documentation:
OCR, or Optical Character Recognition, is a technology that converts different
types of documents, such as scanned paper documents, PDFs, or images captured
by a digital camera, into editable and searchable data by recognizing and
extracting text from the images.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.ScriptExecution
documentation:
Script Execution refers to the process of running a set of programmed
instructions or code within a computing environment, enabling the automated
performance of tasks, calculations, or operations as defined by the script.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.ImageLabelDetection
documentation:
Image Label Detection is a function that automatically identifies and assigns
descriptive tags or labels to objects, scenes, or elements within an image,
enabling easier categorization, search, and analysis of visual content.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.ImageCaptioning
documentation:
Image Captioning is a process that involves generating a textual description of
an image, typically using machine learning models to analyze the visual content
and produce coherent and contextually relevant sentences that describe the
objects, actions, and scenes depicted in the image.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.AudioLanguageIdentification
documentation:
Audio Language Identification is a process that involves analyzing an audio
recording to determine the language being spoken.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.AsrAgeClassification
documentation:
The ASR Age Classification function is designed to analyze audio recordings of
speech to determine the speaker's age group by leveraging automatic speech
recognition (ASR) technology and machine learning algorithms.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.BenchmarkScoringMt
documentation:
Benchmark Scoring MT is a function designed to evaluate and score machine
translation systems by comparing their output against a set of predefined
benchmarks, thereby assessing their accuracy and performance.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.AsrGenderClassification
documentation:
The ASR Gender Classification function analyzes audio recordings to determine
and classify the speaker's gender based on their voice characteristics.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.BaseModel
documentation:
The Base-Model function serves as a foundational framework designed to provide
essential features and capabilities upon which more specialized or advanced
models can be built and customized.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.LanguageIdentificationAudio
documentation:
The Language Identification Audio function analyzes audio input to determine
and identify the language being spoken.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Loglikelihood
documentation:
The Log Likelihood function measures the probability of observing the given
data under a specific statistical model by taking the natural logarithm of the
likelihood function, thereby transforming the product of probabilities into a
sum, which simplifies the process of optimization and parameter estimation.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: number

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.VideoEmbedding
documentation:
Video Embedding is a process that transforms video content into a fixed-
dimensional vector representation, capturing essential features and patterns to
facilitate tasks such as retrieval, classification, and recommendation.

    InputType: video
    OutputType: embedding

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.TextSegmenation
documentation:
Text Segmentation is the process of dividing a continuous text into meaningful
units, such as words, sentences, or topics, to facilitate easier analysis and
understanding.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.ImageEmbedding
documentation:
Image Embedding is a process that transforms an image into a fixed-dimensional
vector representation, capturing its essential features and enabling efficient
comparison, retrieval, and analysis in various machine learning and computer
vision tasks.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.ImageManipulation
documentation:
Image Manipulation refers to the process of altering or enhancing digital
images using various techniques and tools to achieve desired visual effects,
correct imperfections, or transform the image's appearance.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: image

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.ImageToVideoGeneration
documentation:
The Image To Video Generation function transforms a series of static images
into a cohesive, dynamic video sequence, often incorporating transitions,
effects, and synchronization with audio to create a visually engaging
narrative.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: video

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.AudioForcedAlignment
documentation:
Audio Forced Alignment is a process that synchronizes a given audio recording
with its corresponding transcript by precisely aligning each spoken word or
phoneme to its exact timing within the audio.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: audio

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.BenchmarkScoringAsr
documentation:
Benchmark Scoring ASR is a function that evaluates and compares the performance
of automatic speech recognition systems by analyzing their accuracy, speed, and
other relevant metrics against a standardized set of benchmarks.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.VisualQuestionAnswering
documentation:
Visual Question Answering (VQA) is a task in artificial intelligence that
involves analyzing an image and providing accurate, contextually relevant
answers to questions posed about the visual content of that image.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: video

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.DocumentImageParsing
documentation:
Document Image Parsing is the process of analyzing and converting scanned or
photographed images of documents into structured, machine-readable formats by
identifying and extracting text, layout, and other relevant information.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.DocumentInformationExtraction
documentation:
Document Information Extraction is the process of automatically identifying,
extracting, and structuring relevant data from unstructured or semi-structured
documents, such as invoices, receipts, contracts, and forms, to facilitate
easier data management and analysis.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.DepthEstimation
documentation:
Depth estimation is a computational process that determines the distance of
objects from a viewpoint, typically using visual data from cameras or sensors
to create a three-dimensional understanding of a scene.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.VideoGeneration
documentation:
Video Generation is the process of creating video content through automated or
semi-automated means, often utilizing algorithms, artificial intelligence, or
software tools to produce visual and audio elements that can range from simple
animations to complex, realistic scenes.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: video

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.ReferencelessAudioGenerationMetric
documentation:
The Referenceless Audio Generation Metric is a tool designed to evaluate the
quality of generated audio content without the need for a reference or original
audio sample for comparison.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.MultiClassImageClassification
documentation:
Multi Class Image Classification is a machine learning task where an algorithm
is trained to categorize images into one of several predefined classes or
categories based on their visual content.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.SemanticSegmentation
documentation:
Semantic segmentation is a computer vision process that involves classifying
each pixel in an image into a predefined category, effectively partitioning the
image into meaningful segments based on the objects or regions they represent.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.InstanceSegmentation
documentation:
Instance segmentation is a computer vision task that involves detecting and
delineating each distinct object within an image, assigning a unique label and
precise boundary to every individual instance of objects, even if they belong
to the same category.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.ImageColorization
documentation:
Image colorization is a process that involves adding color to grayscale images,
transforming them from black-and-white to full-color representations, often
using advanced algorithms and machine learning techniques to predict and apply
the appropriate hues and shades.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: image

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.AudioGenerationMetric
documentation:
The Audio Generation Metric is a quantitative measure used to evaluate the
quality, accuracy, and overall performance of audio generated by artificial
intelligence systems, often considering factors such as fidelity,
intelligibility, and similarity to human-produced audio.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.ImageImpainting
documentation:
Image inpainting is a process that involves filling in missing or damaged parts
of an image in a way that is visually coherent and seamlessly blends with the
surrounding areas, often using advanced algorithms and techniques to restore
the image to its original or intended appearance.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: image

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.StyleTransfer
documentation:
Style Transfer is a technique in artificial intelligence that applies the
visual style of one image (such as the brushstrokes of a famous painting) to
the content of another image, effectively blending the artistic elements of the
first image with the subject matter of the second.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: image

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.MultiClassTextClassification
documentation:
Multi Class Text Classification is a natural language processing task that
involves categorizing a given text into one of several predefined classes or
categories based on its content.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.TextEmbedding
documentation:
Text embedding is a process that converts text into numerical vectors,
capturing the semantic meaning and contextual relationships of words or
phrases, enabling machines to understand and analyze natural language more
effectively.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.MultiLabelTextClassification
documentation:
Multi Label Text Classification is a natural language processing task where a
given text is analyzed and assigned multiple relevant labels or categories from
a predefined set, allowing for the text to belong to more than one category
simultaneously.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.TextReconstruction
documentation:
Text Reconstruction is a process that involves piecing together fragmented or
incomplete text data to restore it to its original, coherent form.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.FactChecking
documentation:
Fact Checking is the process of verifying the accuracy and truthfulness of
information, statements, or claims by cross-referencing with reliable sources
and evidence.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.SpeechClassification
documentation:
Speech Classification is a process that involves analyzing and categorizing
spoken language into predefined categories or classes based on various features
such as tone, pitch, and linguistic content.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.IntentClassification
documentation:
Intent Classification is a natural language processing task that involves
analyzing and categorizing user text input to determine the underlying purpose
or goal behind the communication, such as booking a flight, asking for weather
information, or setting a reminder.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.PartOfSpeechTagging
documentation:
Part of Speech Tagging is a natural language processing task that involves
assigning each word in a sentence its corresponding part of speech, such as
noun, verb, adjective, or adverb, based on its role and context within the
sentence.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.MetricAggregation
documentation:
Metric Aggregation is a function that computes and summarizes numerical data by
applying statistical operations, such as averaging, summing, or finding the
minimum and maximum values, to provide insights and facilitate analysis of
large datasets.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.DialectDetection
documentation:
Dialect Detection is a function that identifies and classifies the specific
regional or social variations of a language spoken or written by an individual,
enabling the recognition of distinct linguistic patterns and nuances associated
with different dialects.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.InverseTextNormalization
documentation:
Inverse Text Normalization is the process of converting spoken or written
language in its normalized form, such as numbers, dates, and abbreviations,
back into their original, more complex or detailed textual representations.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.TextToAudio
documentation:
The Text to Audio function converts written text into spoken words, allowing
users to listen to the content instead of reading it.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: audio

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.FillTextMask
documentation:
The "Fill Text Mask" function takes a text input with masked or placeholder
characters and replaces those placeholders with specified or contextually
appropriate characters to generate a complete and coherent text output.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.VideoContentModeration
documentation:
Video Content Moderation is the process of reviewing, analyzing, and filtering
video content to ensure it adheres to community guidelines, legal standards,
and platform policies, thereby preventing the dissemination of inappropriate,
harmful, or illegal material.

    InputType: video
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.ExtractAudioFromVideo
documentation:
The "Extract Audio From Video" function allows users to separate and save the
audio track from a video file, enabling them to obtain just the sound without
the accompanying visual content.

    InputType: video
    OutputType: audio

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.ImageCompression
documentation:
Image compression is a process that reduces the file size of an image by
removing redundant or non-essential data, while maintaining an acceptable level
of visual quality.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: image

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.MultilingualSpeechRecognition
documentation:
Multilingual Speech Recognition is a technology that enables the automatic
transcription of spoken language into text across multiple languages, allowing
for seamless communication and understanding in diverse linguistic contexts.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.ReferencelessTextGenerationMetric
documentation:
The Referenceless Text Generation Metric is a method for evaluating the quality
of generated text without requiring a reference text for comparison, often
leveraging models or algorithms to assess coherence, relevance, and fluency
based on intrinsic properties of the text itself.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.TextGenerationMetricDefault
documentation:
The "Text Generation Metric Default" function provides a standard set of
evaluation metrics for assessing the quality and performance of text generation
models.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.NoiseRemoval
documentation:
Noise Removal is a process that involves identifying and eliminating unwanted
random variations or disturbances from an audio signal to enhance the clarity
and quality of the underlying information.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: audio

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.AudioReconstruction
documentation:
Audio Reconstruction is the process of restoring or recreating audio signals
from incomplete, damaged, or degraded recordings to achieve a high-quality,
accurate representation of the original sound.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: audio

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.VoiceCloning
documentation:
Voice cloning is a technology that uses artificial intelligence to create a
digital replica of a person's voice, allowing for the generation of speech that
mimics the tone, pitch, and speaking style of the original speaker.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: audio

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Diacritization
documentation:
Diacritization is the process of adding diacritical marks to letters in a text
to indicate pronunciation, stress, tone, or meaning, often used in languages
such as Arabic, Hebrew, and Vietnamese to provide clarity and accuracy in
written communication.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.AudioEmotionDetection
documentation:
Audio Emotion Detection is a technology that analyzes vocal characteristics and
patterns in audio recordings to identify and classify the emotional state of
the speaker.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.TextSummarization
documentation:
Text summarization is the process of condensing a large body of text into a
shorter version, capturing the main points and essential information while
maintaining coherence and meaning.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.EntityLinking
documentation:
Entity Linking is the process of identifying and connecting mentions of
entities within a text to their corresponding entries in a structured knowledge
base, thereby enabling the disambiguation of terms and enhancing the
understanding of the text's context.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.TextGenerationMetric
documentation:
A Text Generation Metric is a quantitative measure used to evaluate the quality
and effectiveness of text produced by natural language processing models, often
assessing aspects such as coherence, relevance, fluency, and adherence to given
prompts or instructions.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.SplitOnLinebreak
documentation:
The "Split On Linebreak" function divides a given string into a list of
substrings, using linebreaks (newline characters) as the points of separation.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.SentimentAnalysis
documentation:
Sentiment Analysis is a natural language processing technique used to determine
and classify the emotional tone or subjective information expressed in a piece
of text, such as identifying whether the sentiment is positive, negative, or
neutral.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.KeywordSpotting
documentation:
Keyword Spotting is a function that enables the detection and identification of
specific words or phrases within a stream of audio, often used in voice-
activated systems to trigger actions or commands based on recognized keywords.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.TextClassification
documentation:
Text Classification is a natural language processing task that involves
categorizing text into predefined labels or classes based on its content,
enabling automated organization, filtering, and analysis of large volumes of
textual data.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.OtherMultipurpose
documentation:
The "Other (Multipurpose)" function serves as a versatile category designed to
accommodate a wide range of tasks and activities that do not fit neatly into
predefined classifications, offering flexibility and adaptability for various
needs.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.SpeechSynthesis
documentation:
Speech synthesis is the artificial production of human speech, typically
achieved through software or hardware systems that convert text into spoken
words, enabling machines to communicate verbally with users.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: audio

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.AudioIntentDetection
documentation:
Audio Intent Detection is a process that involves analyzing audio signals to
identify and interpret the underlying intentions or purposes behind spoken
words, enabling systems to understand and respond appropriately to human
speech.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.VideoLabelDetection
documentation:
Video Label Detection is a function that automatically identifies and tags
various objects, scenes, activities, and other relevant elements within a
video, providing descriptive labels that enhance searchability and content
organization.

    InputType: video
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.AsrQualityEstimation
documentation:
ASR Quality Estimation is a process that evaluates the accuracy and reliability
of automatic speech recognition systems by analyzing their performance in
transcribing spoken language into text.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.AudioTranscriptAnalysis
documentation:
Audio Transcript Analysis is a process that involves converting spoken language
from audio recordings into written text, followed by examining and interpreting
the transcribed content to extract meaningful insights, identify patterns, and
derive actionable information.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Search
documentation:
The "Search" function allows users to input keywords or phrases to quickly
locate specific information, files, or content within a database, website, or
application.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.VideoForcedAlignment
documentation:
Video Forced Alignment is a process that synchronizes video footage with
corresponding audio tracks by precisely aligning the visual and auditory
elements, ensuring that the movements of speakers' lips match the spoken words.

    InputType: video
    OutputType: video

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.VisemeGeneration
documentation:
Viseme Generation is the process of creating visual representations of
phonemes, which are the distinct units of sound in speech, to synchronize lip
movements with spoken words in animations or virtual avatars.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.TopicClassification
documentation:
Topic Classification is a natural language processing function that categorizes
text into predefined topics or subjects based on its content, enabling
efficient organization and retrieval of information.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.OffensiveLanguageIdentification
documentation:
Offensive Language Identification is a function that analyzes text to detect
and flag language that is abusive, harmful, or inappropriate, helping to
maintain a respectful and safe communication environment.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.SpeechTranslation
documentation:
Speech Translation is a technology that converts spoken language in real-time
from one language to another, enabling seamless communication between speakers
of different languages.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.SpeakerDiarizationAudio
documentation:
Speaker Diarization Audio is a process that involves segmenting an audio
recording into distinct sections, each corresponding to a different speaker, in
order to identify and differentiate between multiple speakers within the same
audio stream.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.AudioTranscriptImprovement
documentation:
Audio Transcript Improvement is a function that enhances the accuracy and
clarity of transcribed audio recordings by correcting errors, refining
language, and ensuring the text faithfully represents the original spoken
content.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.SpeechNonSpeechClassification
documentation:
The function "Speech or Non-Speech Classification" is designed to analyze audio
input and determine whether the sound is human speech or non-speech noise,
enabling applications such as voice recognition systems to filter out
irrelevant background sounds.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.TextDenormalization
documentation:
Text Denormalization is the process of converting abbreviated, contracted, or
otherwise simplified text into its full, standard form, often to improve
readability and ensure consistency in natural language processing tasks.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.ImageContentModeration
documentation:
Image Content Moderation is a process that involves analyzing and filtering
images to detect and manage inappropriate, harmful, or sensitive content,
ensuring compliance with community guidelines and legal standards.

    InputType: image
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.ReferencelessTextGenerationMetricDefault
documentation:
The Referenceless Text Generation Metric Default is a function designed to
evaluate the quality of generated text without relying on reference texts for
comparison.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.NamedEntityRecognition
documentation:
Named Entity Recognition (NER) is a natural language processing task that
involves identifying and classifying proper nouns in text into predefined
categories such as names of people, organizations, locations, dates, and other
entities.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.TextContentModeration
documentation:
Text Content Moderation is the process of reviewing, filtering, and managing
user-generated content to ensure it adheres to community guidelines, legal
standards, and platform policies, thereby maintaining a safe and respectful
online environment.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.SpeakerDiarizationVideo
documentation:
The Speaker Diarization Video function identifies and segments different
speakers in a video, attributing portions of the audio to individual speakers
to facilitate analysis and understanding of multi-speaker conversations.

    InputType: video
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.SplitOnSilence
documentation:
The "Split On Silence" function divides an audio recording into separate
segments based on periods of silence, allowing for easier editing and analysis
of individual sections.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: audio

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.EmotionDetection
documentation:
Emotion Detection is a process that involves analyzing text to identify and
categorize the emotional states or sentiments expressed by individuals, such as
happiness, sadness, anger, or fear.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.TextSpamDetection
documentation:
Text Spam Detection is a process that involves analyzing and identifying
unsolicited or irrelevant messages within text communications, typically using
algorithms and machine learning techniques to filter out spam and ensure the
integrity of the communication platform.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Translation
documentation:
Translation is the process of converting text from one language into an
equivalent text in another language, preserving the original meaning and
context.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.VoiceActivityDetection
documentation:
Voice Activity Detection (VAD) is a technology that identifies the presence or
absence of human speech within an audio signal, enabling systems to distinguish
between spoken words and background noise.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: audio

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.SpeechEmbedding
documentation:
Speech Embedding is a process that transforms spoken language into a fixed-
dimensional vector representation, capturing essential features and
characteristics of the speech for tasks such as recognition, classification,
and analysis.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.SubtitlingTranslation
documentation:
Subtitling Translation is the process of converting spoken dialogue from one
language into written text in another language, which is then displayed on-
screen to aid viewers in understanding the content.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.TextGeneration
documentation:
Text Generation is a process in which artificial intelligence models, such as
neural networks, produce coherent and contextually relevant text based on a
given input or prompt, often mimicking human writing styles and patterns.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.VideoUnderstanding
documentation:
Video Understanding is the process of analyzing and interpreting video content
to extract meaningful information, such as identifying objects, actions,
events, and contextual relationships within the footage.

    InputType: video
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.TextToVideoGeneration
documentation:
Text To Video Generation is a process that converts written descriptions or
scripts into dynamic, visual video content using advanced algorithms and
artificial intelligence.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: video

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.TextNormalization
documentation:
Text normalization is the process of transforming text into a standard,
consistent format by correcting spelling errors, converting all characters to a
uniform case, removing punctuation, and expanding abbreviations to improve the
text's readability and usability for further processing or analysis.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: label

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.SpeechRecognition
documentation:
Speech recognition is a technology that enables a computer or device to
identify and process spoken language, converting it into text.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Subtitling
documentation:
Subtitling is the process of displaying written text on a screen to represent
the spoken dialogue, narration, or other audio elements in a video, typically
to aid viewers who are deaf or hard of hearing, or to provide translations for
audiences who speak different languages.

    InputType: audio
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.ClassificationMetric
documentation:
A Classification Metric is a quantitative measure used to evaluate the quality
and effectiveness of classification models.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: text

classes.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.TextToImageGeneration
documentation:
Text To Image Generation is a process where a system creates visual images
based on descriptive text input, translating written language into
corresponding graphical representations.

    InputType: text
    OutputType: image

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.object_detection
documentation:
Object Detection is a computer vision technology that identifies and locates
objects within an image, typically by drawing bounding boxes around the
detected objects and classifying them into predefined categories.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.language_identification
documentation:
Language Identification is the process of automatically determining the
language in which a given piece of text is written.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.ocr
documentation:
OCR, or Optical Character Recognition, is a technology that converts different
types of documents, such as scanned paper documents, PDFs, or images captured
by a digital camera, into editable and searchable data by recognizing and
extracting text from the images.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.script_execution
documentation:
Script Execution refers to the process of running a set of programmed
instructions or code within a computing environment, enabling the automated
performance of tasks, calculations, or operations as defined by the script.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.image_label_detection
documentation:
Image Label Detection is a function that automatically identifies and assigns
descriptive tags or labels to objects, scenes, or elements within an image,
enabling easier categorization, search, and analysis of visual content.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.image_captioning
documentation:
Image Captioning is a process that involves generating a textual description of
an image, typically using machine learning models to analyze the visual content
and produce coherent and contextually relevant sentences that describe the
objects, actions, and scenes depicted in the image.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.audio_language_identification
documentation:
Audio Language Identification is a process that involves analyzing an audio
recording to determine the language being spoken.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.asr_age_classification
documentation:
The ASR Age Classification function is designed to analyze audio recordings of
speech to determine the speaker's age group by leveraging automatic speech
recognition (ASR) technology and machine learning algorithms.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.benchmark_scoring_mt
documentation:
Benchmark Scoring MT is a function designed to evaluate and score machine
translation systems by comparing their output against a set of predefined
benchmarks, thereby assessing their accuracy and performance.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.asr_gender_classification
documentation:
The ASR Gender Classification function analyzes audio recordings to determine
and classify the speaker's gender based on their voice characteristics.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.base_model
documentation:
The Base-Model function serves as a foundational framework designed to provide
essential features and capabilities upon which more specialized or advanced
models can be built and customized.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.language_identification_audio
documentation:
The Language Identification Audio function analyzes audio input to determine
and identify the language being spoken.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.loglikelihood
documentation:
The Log Likelihood function measures the probability of observing the given
data under a specific statistical model by taking the natural logarithm of the
likelihood function, thereby transforming the product of probabilities into a
sum, which simplifies the process of optimization and parameter estimation.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.video_embedding
documentation:
Video Embedding is a process that transforms video content into a fixed-
dimensional vector representation, capturing essential features and patterns to
facilitate tasks such as retrieval, classification, and recommendation.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.text_segmenation
documentation:
Text Segmentation is the process of dividing a continuous text into meaningful
units, such as words, sentences, or topics, to facilitate easier analysis and
understanding.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.image_embedding
documentation:
Image Embedding is a process that transforms an image into a fixed-dimensional
vector representation, capturing its essential features and enabling efficient
comparison, retrieval, and analysis in various machine learning and computer
vision tasks.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.image_manipulation
documentation:
Image Manipulation refers to the process of altering or enhancing digital
images using various techniques and tools to achieve desired visual effects,
correct imperfections, or transform the image's appearance.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.image_to_video_generation
documentation:
The Image To Video Generation function transforms a series of static images
into a cohesive, dynamic video sequence, often incorporating transitions,
effects, and synchronization with audio to create a visually engaging
narrative.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.audio_forced_alignment
documentation:
Audio Forced Alignment is a process that synchronizes a given audio recording
with its corresponding transcript by precisely aligning each spoken word or
phoneme to its exact timing within the audio.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.benchmark_scoring_asr
documentation:
Benchmark Scoring ASR is a function that evaluates and compares the performance
of automatic speech recognition systems by analyzing their accuracy, speed, and
other relevant metrics against a standardized set of benchmarks.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.visual_question_answering
documentation:
Visual Question Answering (VQA) is a task in artificial intelligence that
involves analyzing an image and providing accurate, contextually relevant
answers to questions posed about the visual content of that image.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.document_image_parsing
documentation:
Document Image Parsing is the process of analyzing and converting scanned or
photographed images of documents into structured, machine-readable formats by
identifying and extracting text, layout, and other relevant information.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.document_information_extraction
documentation:
Document Information Extraction is the process of automatically identifying,
extracting, and structuring relevant data from unstructured or semi-structured
documents, such as invoices, receipts, contracts, and forms, to facilitate
easier data management and analysis.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.depth_estimation
documentation:
Depth estimation is a computational process that determines the distance of
objects from a viewpoint, typically using visual data from cameras or sensors
to create a three-dimensional understanding of a scene.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.video_generation
documentation:
Video Generation is the process of creating video content through automated or
semi-automated means, often utilizing algorithms, artificial intelligence, or
software tools to produce visual and audio elements that can range from simple
animations to complex, realistic scenes.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.referenceless_audio_generation_metric
documentation:
The Referenceless Audio Generation Metric is a tool designed to evaluate the
quality of generated audio content without the need for a reference or original
audio sample for comparison.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.multi_class_image_classification
documentation:
Multi Class Image Classification is a machine learning task where an algorithm
is trained to categorize images into one of several predefined classes or
categories based on their visual content.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.semantic_segmentation
documentation:
Semantic segmentation is a computer vision process that involves classifying
each pixel in an image into a predefined category, effectively partitioning the
image into meaningful segments based on the objects or regions they represent.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.instance_segmentation
documentation:
Instance segmentation is a computer vision task that involves detecting and
delineating each distinct object within an image, assigning a unique label and
precise boundary to every individual instance of objects, even if they belong
to the same category.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.image_colorization
documentation:
Image colorization is a process that involves adding color to grayscale images,
transforming them from black-and-white to full-color representations, often
using advanced algorithms and machine learning techniques to predict and apply
the appropriate hues and shades.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.audio_generation_metric
documentation:
The Audio Generation Metric is a quantitative measure used to evaluate the
quality, accuracy, and overall performance of audio generated by artificial
intelligence systems, often considering factors such as fidelity,
intelligibility, and similarity to human-produced audio.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.image_impainting
documentation:
Image inpainting is a process that involves filling in missing or damaged parts
of an image in a way that is visually coherent and seamlessly blends with the
surrounding areas, often using advanced algorithms and techniques to restore
the image to its original or intended appearance.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.style_transfer
documentation:
Style Transfer is a technique in artificial intelligence that applies the
visual style of one image (such as the brushstrokes of a famous painting) to
the content of another image, effectively blending the artistic elements of the
first image with the subject matter of the second.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.multi_class_text_classification
documentation:
Multi Class Text Classification is a natural language processing task that
involves categorizing a given text into one of several predefined classes or
categories based on its content.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.text_embedding
documentation:
Text embedding is a process that converts text into numerical vectors,
capturing the semantic meaning and contextual relationships of words or
phrases, enabling machines to understand and analyze natural language more
effectively.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.multi_label_text_classification
documentation:
Multi Label Text Classification is a natural language processing task where a
given text is analyzed and assigned multiple relevant labels or categories from
a predefined set, allowing for the text to belong to more than one category
simultaneously.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.text_reconstruction
documentation:
Text Reconstruction is a process that involves piecing together fragmented or
incomplete text data to restore it to its original, coherent form.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.fact_checking
documentation:
Fact Checking is the process of verifying the accuracy and truthfulness of
information, statements, or claims by cross-referencing with reliable sources
and evidence.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.speech_classification
documentation:
Speech Classification is a process that involves analyzing and categorizing
spoken language into predefined categories or classes based on various features
such as tone, pitch, and linguistic content.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.intent_classification
documentation:
Intent Classification is a natural language processing task that involves
analyzing and categorizing user text input to determine the underlying purpose
or goal behind the communication, such as booking a flight, asking for weather
information, or setting a reminder.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.part_of_speech_tagging
documentation:
Part of Speech Tagging is a natural language processing task that involves
assigning each word in a sentence its corresponding part of speech, such as
noun, verb, adjective, or adverb, based on its role and context within the
sentence.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.metric_aggregation
documentation:
Metric Aggregation is a function that computes and summarizes numerical data by
applying statistical operations, such as averaging, summing, or finding the
minimum and maximum values, to provide insights and facilitate analysis of
large datasets.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.dialect_detection
documentation:
Dialect Detection is a function that identifies and classifies the specific
regional or social variations of a language spoken or written by an individual,
enabling the recognition of distinct linguistic patterns and nuances associated
with different dialects.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.inverse_text_normalization
documentation:
Inverse Text Normalization is the process of converting spoken or written
language in its normalized form, such as numbers, dates, and abbreviations,
back into their original, more complex or detailed textual representations.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.text_to_audio
documentation:
The Text to Audio function converts written text into spoken words, allowing
users to listen to the content instead of reading it.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.fill_text_mask
documentation:
The "Fill Text Mask" function takes a text input with masked or placeholder
characters and replaces those placeholders with specified or contextually
appropriate characters to generate a complete and coherent text output.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.video_content_moderation
documentation:
Video Content Moderation is the process of reviewing, analyzing, and filtering
video content to ensure it adheres to community guidelines, legal standards,
and platform policies, thereby preventing the dissemination of inappropriate,
harmful, or illegal material.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.extract_audio_from_video
documentation:
The "Extract Audio From Video" function allows users to separate and save the
audio track from a video file, enabling them to obtain just the sound without
the accompanying visual content.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.image_compression
documentation:
Image compression is a process that reduces the file size of an image by
removing redundant or non-essential data, while maintaining an acceptable level
of visual quality.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.multilingual_speech_recognition
documentation:
Multilingual Speech Recognition is a technology that enables the automatic
transcription of spoken language into text across multiple languages, allowing
for seamless communication and understanding in diverse linguistic contexts.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.referenceless_text_generation_metric
documentation:
The Referenceless Text Generation Metric is a method for evaluating the quality
of generated text without requiring a reference text for comparison, often
leveraging models or algorithms to assess coherence, relevance, and fluency
based on intrinsic properties of the text itself.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.text_generation_metric_default
documentation:
The "Text Generation Metric Default" function provides a standard set of
evaluation metrics for assessing the quality and performance of text generation
models.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.noise_removal
documentation:
Noise Removal is a process that involves identifying and eliminating unwanted
random variations or disturbances from an audio signal to enhance the clarity
and quality of the underlying information.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.audio_reconstruction
aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.voice_cloning
documentation:
Voice cloning is a technology that uses artificial intelligence to create a
digital replica of a person's voice, allowing for the generation of speech that
mimics the tone, pitch, and speaking style of the original speaker.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.diacritization
documentation:
Diacritization is the process of adding diacritical marks to letters in a text
to indicate pronunciation, stress, tone, or meaning, often used in languages
such as Arabic, Hebrew, and Vietnamese to provide clarity and accuracy in
written communication.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.audio_emotion_detection
documentation:
Audio Emotion Detection is a technology that analyzes vocal characteristics and
patterns in audio recordings to identify and classify the emotional state of
the speaker.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.text_summarization
documentation:
Text summarization is the process of condensing a large body of text into a
shorter version, capturing the main points and essential information while
maintaining coherence and meaning.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.entity_linking
documentation:
Entity Linking is the process of identifying and connecting mentions of
entities within a text to their corresponding entries in a structured knowledge
base, thereby enabling the disambiguation of terms and enhancing the
understanding of the text's context.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.text_generation_metric
documentation:
A Text Generation Metric is a quantitative measure used to evaluate the quality
and effectiveness of text produced by natural language processing models, often
assessing aspects such as coherence, relevance, fluency, and adherence to given
prompts or instructions.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.split_on_linebreak
documentation:
The "Split On Linebreak" function divides a given string into a list of
substrings, using linebreaks (newline characters) as the points of separation.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.sentiment_analysis
documentation:
Sentiment Analysis is a natural language processing technique used to determine
and classify the emotional tone or subjective information expressed in a piece
of text, such as identifying whether the sentiment is positive, negative, or
neutral.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.keyword_spotting
documentation:
Keyword Spotting is a function that enables the detection and identification of
specific words or phrases within a stream of audio, often used in voice-
activated systems to trigger actions or commands based on recognized keywords.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.text_classification
documentation:
Text Classification is a natural language processing task that involves
categorizing text into predefined labels or classes based on its content,
enabling automated organization, filtering, and analysis of large volumes of
textual data.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.other__multipurpose_
documentation:
The "Other (Multipurpose)" function serves as a versatile category designed to
accommodate a wide range of tasks and activities that do not fit neatly into
predefined classifications, offering flexibility and adaptability for various
needs.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.speech_synthesis
documentation:
Speech synthesis is the artificial production of human speech, typically
achieved through software or hardware systems that convert text into spoken
words, enabling machines to communicate verbally with users.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.audio_intent_detection
documentation:
Audio Intent Detection is a process that involves analyzing audio signals to
identify and interpret the underlying intentions or purposes behind spoken
words, enabling systems to understand and respond appropriately to human
speech.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.video_label_detection
documentation:
Video Label Detection is a function that automatically identifies and tags
various objects, scenes, activities, and other relevant elements within a
video, providing descriptive labels that enhance searchability and content
organization.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.asr_quality_estimation
documentation:
ASR Quality Estimation is a process that evaluates the accuracy and reliability
of automatic speech recognition systems by analyzing their performance in
transcribing spoken language into text.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.audio_transcript_analysis
documentation:
Audio Transcript Analysis is a process that involves converting spoken language
from audio recordings into written text, followed by examining and interpreting
the transcribed content to extract meaningful insights, identify patterns, and
derive actionable information.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.search
documentation:
The "Search" function allows users to input keywords or phrases to quickly
locate specific information, files, or content within a database, website, or
application.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.video_forced_alignment
documentation:
Video Forced Alignment is a process that synchronizes video footage with
corresponding audio tracks by precisely aligning the visual and auditory
elements, ensuring that the movements of speakers' lips match the spoken words.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.viseme_generation
documentation:
Viseme Generation is the process of creating visual representations of
phonemes, which are the distinct units of sound in speech, to synchronize lip
movements with spoken words in animations or virtual avatars.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.topic_classification
documentation:
Topic Classification is a natural language processing function that categorizes
text into predefined topics or subjects based on its content, enabling
efficient organization and retrieval of information.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.offensive_language_identification
documentation:
Offensive Language Identification is a function that analyzes text to detect
and flag language that is abusive, harmful, or inappropriate, helping to
maintain a respectful and safe communication environment.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.speech_translation
documentation:
Speech Translation is a technology that converts spoken language in real-time
from one language to another, enabling seamless communication between speakers
of different languages.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.speaker_diarization_audio
documentation:
Speaker Diarization Audio is a process that involves segmenting an audio
recording into distinct sections, each corresponding to a different speaker, in
order to identify and differentiate between multiple speakers within the same
audio stream.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.audio_transcript_improvement
documentation:
Audio Transcript Improvement is a function that enhances the accuracy and
clarity of transcribed audio recordings by correcting errors, refining
language, and ensuring the text faithfully represents the original spoken
content.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.speech_non_speech_classification
documentation:
The function "Speech or Non-Speech Classification" is designed to analyze audio
input and determine whether the sound is human speech or non-speech noise,
enabling applications such as voice recognition systems to filter out
irrelevant background sounds.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.text_denormalization
documentation:
Text Denormalization is the process of converting abbreviated, contracted, or
otherwise simplified text into its full, standard form, often to improve
readability and ensure consistency in natural language processing tasks.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.image_content_moderation
documentation:
Image Content Moderation is a process that involves analyzing and filtering
images to detect and manage inappropriate, harmful, or sensitive content,
ensuring compliance with community guidelines and legal standards.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.referenceless_text_generation_metric_default
documentation:
The Referenceless Text Generation Metric Default is a function designed to
evaluate the quality of generated text without relying on reference texts for
comparison.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.named_entity_recognition
documentation:
Named Entity Recognition (NER) is a natural language processing task that
involves identifying and classifying proper nouns in text into predefined
categories such as names of people, organizations, locations, dates, and other
entities.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.text_content_moderation
documentation:
Text Content Moderation is the process of reviewing, filtering, and managing
user-generated content to ensure it adheres to community guidelines, legal
standards, and platform policies, thereby maintaining a safe and respectful
online environment.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.speaker_diarization_video
documentation:
The Speaker Diarization Video function identifies and segments different
speakers in a video, attributing portions of the audio to individual speakers
to facilitate analysis and understanding of multi-speaker conversations.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.split_on_silence
documentation:
The "Split On Silence" function divides an audio recording into separate
segments based on periods of silence, allowing for easier editing and analysis
of individual sections.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.emotion_detection
documentation:
Emotion Detection is a process that involves analyzing text to identify and
categorize the emotional states or sentiments expressed by individuals, such as
happiness, sadness, anger, or fear.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.text_spam_detection
documentation:
Text Spam Detection is a process that involves analyzing and identifying
unsolicited or irrelevant messages within text communications, typically using
algorithms and machine learning techniques to filter out spam and ensure the
integrity of the communication platform.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.translation
documentation:
Translation is the process of converting text from one language into an
equivalent text in another language, preserving the original meaning and
context.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.voice_activity_detection
documentation:
Voice Activity Detection (VAD) is a technology that identifies the presence or
absence of human speech within an audio signal, enabling systems to distinguish
between spoken words and background noise.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.speech_embedding
documentation:
Speech Embedding is a process that transforms spoken language into a fixed-
dimensional vector representation, capturing essential features and
characteristics of the speech for tasks such as recognition, classification,
and analysis.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.subtitling_translation
documentation:
Subtitling Translation is the process of converting spoken dialogue from one
language into written text in another language, which is then displayed on-
screen to aid viewers in understanding the content.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.text_generation
documentation:
Text Generation is a process in which artificial intelligence models, such as
neural networks, produce coherent and contextually relevant text based on a
given input or prompt, often mimicking human writing styles and patterns.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.video_understanding
documentation:
Video Understanding is the process of analyzing and interpreting video content
to extract meaningful information, such as identifying objects, actions,
events, and contextual relationships within the footage.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.text_to_video_generation
documentation:
Text To Video Generation is a process that converts written descriptions or
scripts into dynamic, visual video content using advanced algorithms and
artificial intelligence.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.text_normalization
documentation:
Text normalization is the process of transforming text into a standard,
consistent format by correcting spelling errors, converting all characters to a
uniform case, removing punctuation, and expanding abbreviations to improve the
text's readability and usability for further processing or analysis.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.speech_recognition
documentation:
Speech recognition is a technology that enables a computer or device to
identify and process spoken language, converting it into text.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.subtitling
documentation:
Subtitling is the process of displaying written text on a screen to represent
the spoken dialogue, narration, or other audio elements in a video, typically
to aid viewers who are deaf or hard of hearing, or to provide translations for
audiences who speak different languages.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.classification_metric
documentation:
A Classification Metric is a quantitative measure used to evaluate the quality
and effectiveness of classification models.

methods.name: aixplain.modules.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.text_to_image_generation
documentation:
Text To Image Generation is a process where a system creates visual images
based on descriptive text input, translating written language into
corresponding graphical representations.

Returns:

methods.name: aixplain.factories.corpus_factory.CorpusFactory.list
documentation:
Corpus Listing

Args:
    query (Optional[Text], optional): search query. Defaults to None.
    function (Optional[Function], optional): function filter. Defaults to None.
    language (Optional[Union[Language, List[Language]]], optional): language filter. Defaults to None.
    data_type (Optional[DataType], optional): data type filter. Defaults to None.
    license (Optional[License], optional): license filter. Defaults to None.
    page_number (int, optional): page number. Defaults to 0.
    page_size (int, optional): page size. Defaults to 20.

Returns:
    Dict: list of corpora in agreement with the filters, page number, page total and total elements

methods.name: aixplain.factories.corpus_factory.CorpusFactory.get_assets_from_page
documentation:
Get the list of corpora from a given page. Additional task and language filters can be also be provided

Args:
    page_number (int, optional): Page from which corpora are to be listed. Defaults to 1.
    task (Function, optional): Task of listed corpora. Defaults to None.
    language (Text, optional): language of listed corpora. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    List[Corpus]: List of corpora based on given filters

methods.name: aixplain.factories.corpus_factory.CorpusFactory.create
documentation:
Asynchronous call to Upload a corpus to the user's dashboard.

Args:
    name (Text): corpus name
    description (Text): corpus description
    license (License): corpus license
    content_path (Union[Union[Text, Path], List[Union[Text, Path]]]): path to .csv files containing the data
    schema (List[Union[Dict, MetaData]]): meta data
    ref_data (Optional[List[Union[Text, Data]]], optional): referencing data which already exists and should be part of the corpus. Defaults to [].
    tags (Optional[List[Text]], optional): tags that explain the corpus. Defaults to [].
    functions (Optional[List[Function]], optional): AI functions for which the corpus may be used. Defaults to [].
    privacy (Optional[Privacy], optional): visibility of the corpus. Defaults to Privacy.PRIVATE.
    error_handler (ErrorHandler, optional): how to handle failed rows in the data asset. Defaults to ErrorHandler.SKIP.
    api_key (Optional[Text]): team api key. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    Dict: response dict

methods.name: aixplain.factories.benchmark_factory.BenchmarkFactory.create
documentation:
Creates a benchmark based on the information provided like name, dataset list, model list and score list.
Note: This only creates a benchmark. It needs to run seperately using start_benchmark_job.

Args:
    name (str): Unique Name of benchmark
    dataset_list (List[Dataset]): List of Datasets to be used for benchmarking
    model_list (List[Model]): List of Models to be used for benchmarking
    metric_list (List[Metric]): List of Metrics to be used for benchmarking

Returns:
    Benchmark: _description_

methods.name: aixplain.factories.benchmark_factory.BenchmarkFactory.list_normalization_options
documentation:
Get list of supported normalization options for a metric and model to be used in benchmarking

Args:
    metric (Metric): Metric for which normalization options are to be listed
    model(Model): Model to be used in benchmarking

Returns:
    List[str]: List of supported normalization options
